SEARCH

Uses of Package
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.sort

Packages that use de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.sort
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic
provides a representation for the term structure.
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op
contains the operators of JTerms.
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.sort
This package contains different kinds and implementations subtyping interface Sort.
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule
This package contains classes for implementing rules.
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.conditions
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.inst
contains classes for the instantiation of schema variables of Taclets.
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.match.vm.instructions
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.taclettranslation.assumptions
 
  • Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.sort used by de.uka.ilkd.key.logic
    Class
    Description
    GenericSort
    Sort used for generic taclets Within an SVInstantiations-object a generic sort is instantiated by a concrete sort, which has to be a subsort of the instantiations of the supersorts of this sort
    ParametricSortDecl

    Class
    Description
    GenericSort
    Sort used for generic taclets Within an SVInstantiations-object a generic sort is instantiated by a concrete sort, which has to be a subsort of the instantiations of the supersorts of this sort
    ProgramSVSort
    Special "sorts" used for schema variables matching program constructs (class ProgramSV).
  • Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.sort used by de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.sort
    Class
    Description
    ArraySort
    The objects of this class represent array sorts (in the sense of *Java* arrays).
    GenericSort
    Sort used for generic taclets Within an SVInstantiations-object a generic sort is instantiated by a concrete sort, which has to be a subsort of the instantiations of the supersorts of this sort
    GenericSupersortException
    this exception is thrown if a generic sort has been declared with an illegal supersort
    ParametricSortDecl
     
    ParametricSortInstance
     
    ProgramSVSort
    Special "sorts" used for schema variables matching program constructs (class ProgramSV).
    SortImpl
    Abstract base class for implementations of the Sort interface.
